source.purpose: Additional Sonia McRorey source-of-truth material for coachdeimagen.com content strategy, SEO, GEO, schema, methodology pages, service positioning and future page addendums.

governance.reasonRawFilesAreNotCommitted: The folder contains current offer drafts, payment details, old contact details, dated program logistics and private operational material. Public pages and agent docs must use sanitized extracts only.
governance.usageRule: Use as expert source material before writing or refactoring content. Do not copy large blocks into public pages. Extract only short, relevant, Sonia-authored teaching language with editorial review.
publicSafetyRules: Do not publish bank accounts, CLABE, card numbers, payment links, private logistics or old offer prices unless Sonia confirms they are current and public.
Do not publish old emails, old domains or obsolete contact instructions.
Do not let abundance, manifestation, energy or spiritual language dominate executive service pages.
Use coaching de abundancia and mindset material as supporting context for seguridad interna, visibility, decision-making and sustainable growth.
Preserve Sonia's phrasing, but compress it for commercial pages and reserve long-form depth for article, methodology and pillar pages.

sourceStack.role: large blog archive and long-tail language source
candidate quote bank extracted from blog archive
controlled inventory of Drive documents and presentations
candidate quote and signal bank extracted from reviewed Drive documents
human-readable Drive knowledgebase and content usage guide

files.title: Definición Coaching de imagen y coaching de abundancia.pdf
candidateSignals: Coaching de imagen is not only styling; it asks why the person presents themselves that way.
Coaching de abundancia identifies internal brakes around money, deserving, pricing and growth.
sensitivity: review for dated offer language before public use

files.title: Círculos de Dinero y Abundancia.docx
sensitivity: abundance language must stay supporting, not primary executive positioning
review for program logistics and pricing

files.title: Creencias_SoniaMcrorey.docx
candidateSignals: Visibility is not only a content or algorithm problem; it is also permission, security and internal identity.
Invisible beliefs can appear as postponement, minimization, fear of pricing and need for external validation.
sensitivity: avoid turning executive pages into therapy or self-help pages

files.title: Sonia_McRorey_Servicios_v7.docx
candidateSignals: Imagen estrategica para sostener decisiones, visibilidad y dinero.
The work integrates external image, identity coaching and abundance coaching into one process.
sensitivity: contains private payment or banking details
contains contact and offer details that may be outdated
do not commit raw content
